symptoms: Exact public NeMo/Hugging Face checkpoint for the requested multilingual model_id could not be established.
Requested multilingual fixture and transcript are absent in the repository.
Local GPU runtime is unavailable even though the exact public model evidence points to GPU NIM deployment.

evidence.details: VALIDATE_SPEC failed before any runtime test because critical model identity evidence is missing.
nvidia-smi failed and only root-backed storage has meaningful free space.
runtime_path and weights.source conflicts remain unresolved.

recommended_action: Escalate to human review to clarify whether the target should remain a local NeMo checkpoint workflow or be pivoted to NVIDIA NIM docker validation.
